description_long: This handbag features a robust, boxy structure with a metallic, reddish-brown exterior accented by prominent, curved silver handles on each side. The front face displays a large, open compartment or mouth-like opening, suggesting easy access to the interior. The top panel is adorned with a circular, orange decorative element set into a raised, riveted section, giving it an industrial, steampunk-inspired appearance. The back panel is fitted with a blue, digital-like display featuring abstract symbols, adding a technological flair. The handles are thick and appear to be reinforced, likely designed for durability and comfort. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, blending utilitarian and futuristic aesthetics.
description: A boxy, metallic handbag with curved silver handles, a large front opening, and a blue digital display on the back, featuring industrial and futuristic design elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, open compartment and the central orange decorative element on the top panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, curved silver handle and the boxy, riveted body.
description_view_2: Back view reveals a blue digital display with abstract symbols, framed by the metallic structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the handle and the side profile of the handbag's body.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, thick, curved handles attached to each side; not adjustable; designed for hand carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Large front flap or lid, possibly magnetic or snap closure, integrated into the top front section.
attribute_decorative_elements: Raised orange circular element on the top panel, rivet-like details, and a blue digital display on the back.
